title: Rent Relief Act of 2025
plain_summary: This bill creates a new tax credit to help people who spend too much money on rent. If someone pays more than thirty percent of their income for rent, they can get money back on their taxes. People who make less money will get bigger tax credits than people who make more money. The new tax credit will start in 2026.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance.

sections.title: Section 1 Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the Rent Relief Act of two thousand twenty five.

sections.title: Section 2 Refundable Credit for Rent Paid for Principal Residence
sections.text: This section creates a new tax credit for people who rent their homes. If you rent the home where you live most of the time and you pay more than thirty percent of your income in rent, you can get money back on your taxes. The credit amount depends on how much you make. People who make less money get a bigger credit. If you make twenty five thousand dollars or less per year, you get one hundred percent of the extra rent back. If you make between twenty five thousand and fifty thousand dollars, you get seventy five percent back. If you make between fifty thousand and seventy five thousand dollars, you get fifty percent back. If you make between seventy five thousand and one hundred thousand dollars, you get twenty five percent back. If you make over one hundred thousand dollars, you get nothing back. If you live in an expensive area that the government says has high costs, these income limits go up by twenty five thousand dollars each. The credit cannot be more than the fair market rent that the Department of Housing and Urban Development sets for your area. If you live in government subsidized housing where the government helps pay your rent, you can choose a different calculation. Instead of the regular credit, you can get back one twelfth of the rent you actually paid yourself during the year. The government can also pay you this credit in advance each month instead of waiting until you file your taxes. You have to ask for these advance payments when you file your tax return for the year before. If you get advance payments, the final credit when you file your taxes will be reduced by what you already received. This new tax credit starts for tax years beginning after December thirty first two thousand twenty five.
